title: Wynncursor
description: A Cursors Extended add-on to fit the theme of the Wynncraft server resource pack!
body:
<center>

![Wynncursor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TTjDq0jQ/images/76c15b2b7c52e7d8258f3eb3f50ac7e35529a5e8.png)
## Wynncursor
**By Lobby**

Wynncursor changes the default Cursors Extended textures to better fit the theme of Wynncraft's GUI. While Wynncursor is intended for Wynncraft, it can be used anywhere!

To use Wynncursor, first install the [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) mod on any supported Minecraft version, then simply apply this resource pack as you would any other.
